title: zilla spinosa subsp. costata
intro: Zilla spinosa subsp. costata, also known as the 'costate zilla', is a subspecies of the Zilla spinosa plant, a thorny succulent native to South Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms, making it a potential natural remedy for various health issues. The health benefits of the costate zilla include its potential to lower cholesterol levels, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant properties, which can contribute to overall well-being. The herbal preparations of the costate zilla typically involve drying the plant material, then making it into teas, capsules, or infusions, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
